# 3rd Party Integration


UNIGINE SDK Browser contains a set of samples demonstrating how to integrate various third-party libraries into UNIGINE applications. The source code for all samples is available on *[GitHub](https://github.com/)*. You can find direct links to the corresponding GitHub repositories along with build and run instructions on each sample's dedicated page.


![3rd Party Samples section](index.png)
